content.text:
<session_context>
This is the Gemini CLI. We are setting up the context for our chat.
Today's date is Friday, June 12, 2026 (formatted according to the user's locale).
My operating system is: darwin
The project's temporary directory is: /Users/ingo/.gemini/tmp/cwd-53
- **Workspace Directories:**
  - /Users/ingo/projects/irrlicht/.claude/worktrees/gemini-cli-onboard/.build/refresh/gemini-cli/2-3_task-list-20260612T123205/cwd
- **Directory Structure:**

Showing up to 200 items (files + folders).

/Users/ingo/projects/irrlicht/.claude/worktrees/gemini-cli-onboard/.build/refresh/gemini-cli/2-3_task-list-20260612T123205/cwd/
└───.gemini/
    └───settings.json


</session_context>

Use your write_todos tool to create exactly three todo items, in this order: 'read README', 'summarize README', 'reply done'. Then work them one at a time: for each item call write_todos to set it in_progress, then call write_todos again to set it completed, before moving to the next. Keep everything in this one session — do not spawn any subagent. When all three items are completed, reply with exactly the word: done

thoughts.subject: Initiating Task Management
thoughts.description: I've decided to leverage the `write_todos` tool to handle a straightforward three-step task. Currently, the tool holds the initial to-do list: "read README," "summarize README," and "reply done." All items are marked pending as I prepare to start. I'm focusing on ensuring this tool seamlessly manages this process.

thoughts.subject: Managing The Workflow
thoughts.description: I've advanced the task management process. I've created the initial to-do list as requested. The next step, I realized, involves simulating the 'read README' action. I plan to mark this as "in_progress", pretend to read it, and then mark it as "completed". After that, I will "summarize" the imaginary README, and then indicate that I am "done."

toolCalls.name: update_topic

args.title: Managing To-Do List
args.strategic_intent: I will create a todo list with three items: 'read README', 'summarize README', and 'reply done'. I will then process each item sequentially, updating its status to 'in_progress' and then 'completed' using the `write_todos` tool. Once all items are completed, I will reply with the word 'done'.

Current topic: "Managing To-Do List"
Topic summary: ...

Strategic Intent: I will create a todo list with three items: 'read README', 'summarize README', and 'reply done'. I will then process each item sequentially, updating its status to 'in_progress' and then 'completed' using the `write_todos` tool. Once all items are completed, I will reply with the word 'done'.
